title: Software Update - DFU - Entering airplane mode during update
scenario: DFU fails with "Houston..." error when airplane mode is enabled during early update progress, then recovers and completes after retry
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Firmware Update.
3. Start the Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the connected Poly audio device.
4. During the early update progress (0–20% for speakerphone devices; 0–10% for headset + charge case/stand), enable Airplane Mode on the mobile device.
5. Wait for the update to fail. Observe the app screen.
6. Disable Airplane Mode on the mobile device.
7. On the Poly Studio Mobile app, locate the 'Houston...' error page and tap 'Retry'.
expected: After enabling Airplane Mode during early DFU progress, the update should fail and a "Houston..." error page should be displayed. After turning off Airplane Mode and tapping "Retry", the update should restart and complete successfully.
